_comment: Public template. Replace environment variables with your own credentials before running evaluations.

glm-official-1.label: GLM official key
glm-official-1.note: Set BINBENCH_GLM_API_KEY in your shell environment.

dashscope-1.label: DashScope key
dashscope-1.note: Used by qwen3.5-plus in the public template.

minimax-official-1.label: MiniMax official key
minimax-official-1.note: Set BINBENCH_MINIMAX_API_KEY in your shell environment.

deepseek-1.label: SiliconFlow key
deepseek-1.note: Used by the optional deepseek profile.
